Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Berber Group Llc
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jon Freis, 310.276.1218 of the Law Offices Of Jon Freis appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Pols Street Associates.
Andrew Quan, 510.396.2566 of the Law Offices of Andrew Quan appearign via Zoom for Defendant Berber Group.

Argued by Plaintiff. The Plaintiff requests a continuance for the Defendant to provide written confirmation of the debt owed. The Defendant objects to the request for a continuance. The Court denies the request.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF POLK STREET ASSOCIATES Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Berber Group LLC is DENIED. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
